name: Papa's Scooperia
author: Poki
description: While visiting the big city, you've just lost your luggage and all of your money. Papa Louie comes up with solution to help you get back on your feet: He wants you to stay and run his new ice cream shop in Oniontown! You'll be baking fresh cookies, topping them with scoops of decadent ice cream, and adding delicious toppings and syrups before serving the sundaes to your hungry customers. Can you make Papa Louie's new ice cream restaurant an amazing success? How to play Papa's Scooperia? Use the mouse to take orders from guests and create their ice cream! Who created Papa's Scooperia? Papa's Scooperia was created by Flipline Games. Play their other game on Poki: Papa's Pizzeria , Papa's Donuteria and Papa's Burgeria How can I play Papa's Scooperia for free? You can play Papa's Scooperia for free on Poki. Can I play Papa's Scooperia on mobile devices and desktop? Papa's Scooperia can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
